payload.title: Lightweight requires/ensures contracts
payload.description:
Precondition/postcondition syntax that lowers to debug_assert! + a doc line. Agents state intent well in prose; capturing it as a checkable assertion at the boundary catches the gap between stated and actual behavior.

WATCH THE SCOPE: keep opt-in, lowering-only, zero new type machinery. The moment it wants a solver or dataflow, it IS the effects mistake again — cut it there. This is the riskiest item in the tier for exactly that reason.
